content: Quota numbers (free tier, 2026): Gemini text-embedding-004: 100 RPM, 1,000 RPD. Groq most models: 30 RPM, 1,000 RPD, 6,000 TPM. Supabase: 500MB DB storage (pgvector included). pgvector storage math: text-embedding-004 produces 768-dim vectors, 768 * 4 bytes = 3KB per vector + overhead, so ~83K chunks before hitting 500MB. A busy eval run (30+ cases) at multiple tool calls each can exhaust Groq 1,000 RPD. Mitigation: use --delay 3 flag on eval harness, run --offline to skip web cases, never add evals to CI, use exponential backoff on embedding ingestion, batch embedding calls.
